x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist natural language processing performs best on English text. High non-ASCII rates indicate multilingual incident data that may require additional language pack configuration.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Conduct a manual language spot-check of incident short_description and close_notes fields. If significant non-English volume is confirmed, engage ServiceNow account team to discuss multilingual Now Assist language pack configuration.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c22
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist natural language processing performs best on English text. High non-ASCII rates indicate multilingual incident data that may require additional language pack configuration.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Incident Language Distribution</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' incidents in last 12 months (manual language spot-check recommended)';

    return {
        status: 'ready',
        actualValue: actualValue,
        finding: total + ' incidents in the last 12 months. Conduct a manual language spot-check of short_description and close_notes fields. If significant non-English volume is present, confirm multilingual Now Assist language pack configuration with your account team.'
    };
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005953</number>
<order>140</order>
<remediation_guidance>Conduct a manual language spot-check of incident short_description and close_notes fields. If significant non-English volume is confirmed, engage ServiceNow account team to discuss multilingual Now Assist language pack configuration.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c22</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
